scripts.dev: npm run prisma:generate && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run prisma:generate && tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && node --test --import tsx src/shared/*.spec.ts src/lib/services/*.spec.ts src/lib/validations/*.spec.ts src/items/*.spec.ts src/item-relations/*.spec.ts src/modules/quote-items/*.spec.ts src/modules/quotes/*.spec.ts
scripts.db:push: tsx prisma/prepare-role-access.ts && prisma db push && tsx prisma/ensure-constraints.ts && tsx prisma/backfill-request-updates.ts && tsx prisma/backfill-item-price-history.ts && tsx prisma/backfill-lifecycle-events.ts && tsx prisma/backfill-quote-contacts.ts --apply && tsx prisma/backfill-lifecycle-contexts.ts && tsx prisma/backfill-quote-financials.ts --apply
scripts.db:push:accept-data-loss: tsx prisma/prepare-role-access.ts && prisma db push --accept-data-loss && tsx prisma/ensure-constraints.ts && tsx prisma/backfill-request-updates.ts && tsx prisma/backfill-item-price-history.ts && tsx prisma/backfill-lifecycle-events.ts && tsx prisma/backfill-quote-contacts.ts --apply && tsx prisma/backfill-lifecycle-contexts.ts && tsx prisma/backfill-quote-financials.ts --apply
scripts.db:initialize: tsx prisma/assert-uninitialized.ts && npm run prisma:generate && npm run db:push && PULSE_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_SEED=1 npm run db:seed
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run db:push
scripts.db:reset-demo: npm run prisma:generate && npm run db:push:accept-data-loss && PULSE_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_SEED=1 npm run db:seed
